channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Badenoch claims police who arrested Henry Nowak influenced by guidance saying hate crimes should be treated as priority – UK politics live
item.description: Badenoch claims police who arrested Henry Nowak influenced by guidance saying hate crimes should be treated as priority – UK politics live

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: We need a Secretary of State for the Young, writes @zoegrunewald.bsky.social.
Generational inequality won’t be solved without a cabinet counterweight. www.arguably.uk/p/we-need-a-...
item.description:
We need a Secretary of State for the Young, writes @zoegrunewald.bsky.social.
Generational inequality won’t be solved without a cabinet counterweight. www.arguably.uk/p/we-need-a-...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Unions rebuff Farage and say Reform ‘cosplaying’ as workers’ champions
item.description: Unions rebuff Farage and say Reform ‘cosplaying’ as workers’ champions

item.title: FT UK Politics: Will Starmer fight or fold?
The Telegraph: Andy Burnham: I’ll get a grip on illegal migration - The Telegraph
item.description: Andy Burnham: I’ll get a grip on illegal migration - The Telegraph

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK democracy under ‘immense strain’ with just 3% of voters able to tell if a video is real or AI, charity warns
item.description: UK democracy under ‘immense strain’ with just 3% of voters able to tell if a video is real or AI, charity warns

item.title: Bloomberg.com: UK’s Starmer to Announce Under-16s Social Media Ban Within Days - Bloomberg.com

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Rows over defence investment plan ‘have badly harmed cabinet relations’
item.description: Rows over defence investment plan ‘have badly harmed cabinet relations’

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Starmer obviously delusional here, but it stood out to me that Burnham is clearly not up to speed yet. It’s not like the current fiscal rules are wildly convoluted: by the end of the forecast period, current spending ...
item.description: Starmer obviously delusional here, but it stood out to me that Burnham is clearly not up to speed yet. It’s not like the current fiscal rules are wildly convoluted: by the end of the forecast period, current spending ...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Is Keir Starmer trying to build a legacy or just getting on with the job?
item.description: Is Keir Starmer trying to build a legacy or just getting on with the job?
